candidates.why: A separate operating D&A summary row exists above EBIT, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and does not clearly belong to the selected COGS row 'Materials and services'.
This is a D&A component beneath the D&A section, not explicitly tied to COGS, and would also be subordinate to the D&A summary row.
Balancing row, not an operating D&A line to add separately.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The selected COGS bucket is 'Materials and services'; the visible D&A rows appear as separate operating lines but are not identified as cost-of-sales D&A, so conservatively do not add any row to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: This appears to be the summary D&A row: its amount closely matches the sum of the detailed amortisation/depreciation component rows that follow. It sits as a separate same-level operating expense outside the selected XSGA rows ('Employee benefit expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'), so if any D&A is to be added separately, this summary row is the best choice.
A component of the broader D&A section and should not be chosen when the summary 'Depreciation' row is present.
Balancing row, not an operating D&A line to add separately.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A summary row is visible above EBIT and appears outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it likely should be added separately rather than treated as embedded. However, the row is generic and not explicitly split between SG&A and production/COGS, so manual review is warranted before assigning the full amount to XSGA_DA.
